caption: Narendra Modi stands at a wooden podium in a room featuring a textured, green marble wall. He is dressed in a light-colored long-sleeved shirt topped with a white sleeveless jacket. Two microphones are positioned on the podium in front of him. To his side, a decorative gold-colored column holds a small arrangement of pink flowers. Across the sequence, Modi is speaking and gesturing with his hands to emphasize his points. He begins by looking forward with a neutral expression, then shifts his gaze slightly. As he continues, he opens both arms wide in an expressive gesture, and finally, he raises his left hand with his palm facing outward while continuing to speak. The background and his attire remain constant throughout the sequence, while his facial expressions and hand movements evolve to accompany his speech.
